section.heading: Report to Congress
section.chapeau: Not later than 1 year after November 15, 2021, the Under Secretary shall submit to the appropriate congressional committees a report that includes—

paragraph.content: a summary of the efforts of the Under Secretary to provide services to minority business enterprises located in States that lack an MBDA Business Center, as of November 15, 2021, and especially in those States that have significant minority populations; and
recommendations for extending the outreach of the Agency to underserved areas.
